title: The history of the out-of-this-world playlist NASA uses to wake up mission crews - NPR
summary_full: The history of the out-of-this-world playlist NASA uses to wake up mission crews  NPRMoon music: Here's a Spotify playlist of the Artemis 2 crew's wakeup songs  SpaceChappell Roan's 'Pink Pony Club' cuts out in Artemis II wakeup call  USA TodayArtemis II wake-up music: See the playlist of astronaut wake-up songs on their mission  NJ.comArtemis II crew is going further than anyone. But first, some music  The Times
